description: open Data Structure Intoduction module in DS-algo portal

steps.name: Given The user is in the Home page after logged in
When The user clicks on Get Started button Data Structures - Introduction
Then The user should land in Data Structures- Introduction Page
Given user have to fetch python code from Excel file from sheet "Try Editor" and 2  and click run button
Then user execute the Python code and validate the result
